39.reason: [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so child nodes do not get depth+1. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or pass depth+1 directly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Using post-increment (depth++) passes the original value of depth to the recursive call, so child nodes do not get depth+1. Should use pre-increment (++depth) or pass depth+1 directly.]

43.reason: [Same issue: post-increment does not increase depth for the recursive call. This causes incorrect height calculation for leaf nodes.]
